data.name: Status_ModRequiredDependenciesAutoInstallFailedFormat
data.value: Could not automatically install required mod: {0}

data.name: Resources_ModDownloadFileExistsMessageFormat
data.value: A file with the same name already exists in the download location: {0}

data.name: Resources_ModUnknownInstanceVersionMessage
data.value: The game version could not be recognized. Please select it manually.

data.name: Resources_ResourcePackDownloadFileExistsMessageFormat
data.value: A file with the same name already exists in the download location: {0}

data.name: Resources_PlaceholderMessage
data.value: Select a resource category to browse.

data.name: Resources_ModProjectsLoadError
data.value: Failed to load the mod list. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ModProjectsLoadMoreError
data.value: Failed to load more mods. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ModCurseForgeMissingApiKey
data.value: No CurseForge API Key is configured; only Modrinth results are shown.

data.name: Resources_ModInstallTargetSection
data.value: Choose a Game to Install To

data.name: Resources_ModVersionsEmpty
data.value: No mod versions are available for this game

data.name: Resources_ModVersionsLoadMoreError
data.value: Failed to load more mod versions. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ResourcePackProjectsLoadError
data.value: Failed to load the resource pack list. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ResourcePackProjectsLoadMoreError
data.value: Failed to load more resource packs. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ResourcePackCurseForgeMissingApiKey
data.value: No CurseForge API Key is configured; only Modrinth results are shown.

data.name: Resources_ResourcePackInstallTargetSection
data.value: Choose a Game to Install To

data.name: Resources_ResourcePackVersionsEmpty
data.value: No resource pack versions are available for this game

data.name: Resources_ResourcePackVersionsFilterEmpty
data.value: No matching resource pack versions found

data.name: Resources_ResourcePackVersionsLoadError
data.value: Failed to load resource pack versions

data.name: Resources_ResourcePackVersionsLoadMoreError
data.value: Failed to load more resource pack versions. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ShaderPackProjectsLoadError
data.value: Failed to load the shader pack list. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ShaderPackProjectsLoadMoreError
data.value: Failed to load more shader packs. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ShaderPackCurseForgeMissingApiKey
data.value: No CurseForge API Key is configured; only Modrinth results are shown.

data.name: Resources_ShaderPackInstallTargetSection
data.value: Choose a Game to Install To

data.name: Resources_ShaderPackVersionsEmpty
data.value: No shader pack versions are available for this game

data.name: Resources_ShaderPackVersionsFilterEmpty
data.value: No matching shader pack versions found

data.name: Resources_ShaderPackVersionsLoadError
data.value: Failed to load shader pack versions

data.name: Resources_ShaderPackVersionsLoadMoreError
data.value: Failed to load more shader pack versions. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ShaderPackDownloadFileExistsMessageFormat
data.value: A file with the same name already exists in the download location: {0}

data.name: Resources_WorldProjectsLoadError
data.value: Failed to load the world list. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_WorldProjectsLoadMoreError
data.value: Failed to load more worlds. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_WorldCurseForgeMissingApiKey
data.value: No CurseForge API Key is configured, so world results cannot be loaded.

data.name: Resources_WorldInstallTargetSection
data.value: Choose a Game to Install To

data.name: Resources_WorldVersionsEmpty
data.value: No world versions are available for this game

data.name: Resources_WorldVersionsLoadMoreError
data.value: Failed to load more world versions. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_WorldDownloadFileExistsMessageFormat
data.value: A file with the same name already exists in the download location: {0}

data.name: Resources_ModpackProjectsLoadError
data.value: Failed to load the modpack list. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ModpackProjectsLoadMoreError
data.value: Failed to load more modpacks. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ModpackCurseForgeMissingApiKey
data.value: No CurseForge API Key is configured; only Modrinth results are shown.

data.name: Resources_ModpackVersionsLoadMoreError
data.value: Failed to load more modpack versions. Please try again later.

data.name: Resources_ModpackDownloadFileExistsMessageFormat
data.value: A file with the same name already exists in the download location: {0}

data.name: Settings_ControlDemoListItemSubtitle
data.value: Includes an icon, title, subtitle, and trailing text

data.name: Settings_ControlDemoDefaultMultilineInput
data.value: This is a multiline text box example. Longer content wraps automatically.

data.name: Home_ChooseOrCreateAccount
data.value: Choose or create an account to play.

data.name: Account_EmptySelection
data.value: Select an account to view or change settings.

data.name: Account_SkinPreviewEmpty
data.value: No skin preview yet. Refresh the profile or upload a skin to show it.

data.name: Account_AppearanceOfflineUnsupported
data.value: Offline accounts do not support skin/cape management

data.name: Account_OfflineUuidStandardDescription
data.value: Generated consistently from OfflinePlayer:username, compatible with most offline servers.

data.name: Account_OfflineUuidRandomDescription
data.value: Generated once and saved with the account; it stays unchanged after renaming.

data.name: Account_OfflineUuidManualDescription
data.value: Enter a UUID manually; it is saved with the account after applying.

data.name: Account_UsernameValidation
data.value: Username must be 3-16 letters, numbers, or underscores

data.name: Account_TypeOfflineDescription
data.value: Use a local username to play.

data.name: Account_TypeMicrosoftDescription
data.value: Sign in with a Microsoft account to use skins and avatars.

data.name: Account_ProfileOfflineUnsupported
data.value: Offline accounts do not support skin and cape management

data.name: Account_ProfileNoCapes
data.value: This account has no available capes

data.name: Account_ProfileCacheLoaded
data.value: Loaded local cape cache. Refresh to get the latest state.

data.name: Account_ProfileRefreshHint
data.value: Refresh to load this Microsoft account's cape list

data.name: Dialog_AddAccountSubtitle
data.value: Choose the account type to add.

data.name: Dialog_AddOfflineAccountSubtitle
data.value: Enter a local username for offline play.

data.name: Dialog_AddMicrosoftAccountSubtitle
data.value: Complete sign-in on the Microsoft page that opens.

data.name: Dialog_AddAccountResultSubtitle
data.value: Click OK to return to the account list.

data.name: Dialog_DeleteAccountMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this account?

data.name: Dialog_RenameAccountBusySubtitle
data.value: Please wait while the account name is being changed.

data.name: Dialog_RenameAccountResultSubtitle
data.value: Click OK to return to account details.

data.name: Dialog_RenameMicrosoftAccountSubtitle
data.value: Microsoft account names can be changed once every 30 days. Be careful.

data.name: Dialog_RenameOfflineAccountSubtitle
data.value: Enter a new offline account name.

data.name: Dialog_SkinModelSubtitle
data.value: Choose the model used by this skin.

data.name: Download_LocalImportDialogSubtitle
data.value: Import a local game or modpack by choosing a file or dropping it here.

data.name: Download_LocalImportDropZoneSubtitle
data.value: You can also use the Choose File button in the lower-left corner.

data.name: Download_LocalImportUnrecognizedMessage
data.value: The selected file could not be recognized. Choose a supported modpack file.

data.name: Download_VanillaLoaderSubtitle
data.value: Do not install a mod loader

data.name: Download_FabricLoaderSubtitle
data.value: Choose and install a Fabric version

data.name: Download_ForgeLoaderSubtitle
data.value: Choose and install a Forge version

data.name: Download_NeoForgeLoaderSubtitle
data.value: Choose and install a NeoForge version

data.name: Download_QuiltLoaderSubtitle
data.value: Choose and install a Quilt version

data.name: Status_LaunchAccountUnavailable
data.value: The current account cannot launch the game. Sign in again or switch accounts.

data.name: Status_LaunchExitedQuickly
data.value: The game exited immediately after launch. Diagnostics were saved; check the logs\launcher folder for this instance.

data.name: Status_LaunchProcessExited
data.value: The game process exited. Diagnostics were saved.

data.name: Status_LaunchAbnormalExit
data.value: The game exited abnormally during startup. Diagnostics were saved.

data.name: Status_LaunchRuntimeAbnormalExit
data.value: The game exited abnormally while running. Diagnostics were saved.

data.name: Status_LaunchFailed
data.value: Launch failed. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_LaunchInstanceRepairFailed
data.value: The current instance is missing critical files and cannot be repaired without adding a new version. Reinstall this instance or check the version files.

data.name: Status_LaunchInstanceSelectionFailed
data.value: Failed to switch the current game. Refresh and try again.

data.name: Status_LocalModImportFileNotFound
data.value: Could not find the mod file to import.

data.name: Status_LocalSaveImportFileNotFound
data.value: Could not find the save archive to import.

data.name: Status_ModCompatibleFileNotFound
data.value: No mod file compatible with the current game was found.

data.name: Status_SettingsSaveFailed
data.value: Failed to save launcher settings. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_JavaScanFailed
data.value: Failed to scan local Java runtimes. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_JavaImportFailed
data.value: Failed to import Java. Make sure the selected file is a Java executable.

data.name: Status_JavaSelectionFailed
data.value: Java selection is unavailable. Check Java settings in global settings.

data.name: Status_LoadInstancesFailed
data.value: Failed to load games. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_LoadVersionsFailed
data.value: Failed to load the version list. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_UnimplementedCategory
data.value: This category will be available later.

data.name: Status_DuplicateInstanceName
data.value: An instance with this name already exists.

data.name: Status_InstallFailed
data.value: Installation failed. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_ModpackInvalidArchive
data.value: The modpack format is unsupported or the file is corrupted

data.name: Status_ModpackUnsupportedLoader
data.value: Only Vanilla, Fabric, Forge, NeoForge, and Quilt modpacks are supported

data.name: Status_LoaderInstallPending
data.value: This loader will be installable in a future version.

data.name: Status_FabricLoaderVersionsLoadFailed
data.value: Failed to load Fabric versions. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_LoaderVersionsLoadFailedFormat
data.value: Failed to load {0} versions. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_FabricApiVersionsLoadFailed
data.value: Failed to load Fabric API versions; it will not be installed.

data.name: Status_QuiltLibraryVersionsLoadFailed
data.value: Failed to load QFAPI / QSL versions; it will not be installed.

data.name: Status_LoginMicrosoftActive
data.value: Waiting for Microsoft sign-in to complete.

data.name: Status_LoginMissingProfile
data.value: Microsoft sign-in failed: Minecraft Java profile was not found

data.name: Status_LoginAccountAlreadyAddedFormat
data.value: Microsoft account {0} has already been added and is now selected

data.name: Status_LoginFailed
data.value: Microsoft sign-in failed. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_OfflineUuidModeChangeFailed
data.value: Failed to change offline UUID mode. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_OfflineUuidInvalid
data.value: Invalid UUID format. Check it and try again.

data.name: Status_AccountDeletedCacheCleanupFailedFormat
data.value: Deleted account {0} from the list, but failed to clear sign-in cache.

data.name: Status_AccountRenameFailed
data.value: Failed to change account name. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_AccountRenameFailedDuplicateName
data.value: Failed to change account name: this username is already taken.

data.name: Status_AccountRenameFailedNotAllowed
data.value: Failed to change account name: this account cannot be renamed yet, likely because the 30-day cooldown has not ended.

data.name: Status_AccountRenameFailedInvalidName
data.value: Failed to change account name: username format does not meet Minecraft rules.

data.name: Status_AccountProfileRefreshFailed
data.value: Failed to refresh Microsoft account profile. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_AccountProfileRefreshTooFrequent
data.value: Refreshing too often. Try again later.

data.name: Status_AccountProfileRefreshOfflineUnsupported
data.value: Only Microsoft accounts can refresh profile data

data.name: Status_SkinOfflineUnsupported
data.value: Only Microsoft accounts can change skins

data.name: Status_SkinAdded
data.value: Skin added. Click Apply to sync it to the official site.

data.name: Status_SkinModelChanged
data.value: Skin model changed. Click Apply to sync it to the official site.

data.name: Status_SkinDeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete skin. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_SkinUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to change skin. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_CapeOfflineUnsupported
data.value: Only Microsoft accounts can change capes

data.name: Status_CapeChangeFailed
data.value: Failed to change cape. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_LoadAccountProfileFailed
data.value: Failed to load Microsoft account profile. Please try again later.

data.name: FilePicker_LocalImportFileTitle
data.value: Choose Local Game or Modpack File

data.name: Status_DeleteInstanceFailed
data.value: Failed to delete version. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_OpenInstanceFolderFailed
data.value: Failed to open the instance folder.

data.name: Status_OpenLaunchLogFolderFailed
data.value: Failed to open the launch log folder.

data.name: Status_OpenGithubRepositoryFailed
data.value: Failed to open the GitHub repository.

data.name: Status_OpenReferenceProjectFailed
data.value: Failed to open the reference project.

data.name: GameSettings_DetailsPlaceholderBody
data.value: More detailed settings for this version will be added here. More editable options will be added next.

data.name: GameSettings_DetailPlaceholderBodyFormat
data.value: More settings related to "{0}" will be added here. Editable options will be added next.

data.name: GameSettings_ModManagementInstalledSummaryFormat
data.value: This game has {0} mods installed, {1} enabled

data.name: Dialog_RenameInstanceSubtitle
data.value: Change the name and icon of the current instance.

data.name: Dialog_RenameInstanceBusySubtitle
data.value: Updating the version folder and configuration. Please wait.

data.name: Dialog_RenameInstanceResultSubtitle
data.value: Click OK to return to version details.

data.name: Dialog_CreateBackupSubtitle
data.value: Enter a name for this backup.

data.name: Dialog_DeleteBackupMessageFormat
data.value: Delete backup "{0}"? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Dialog_DeleteMultipleBackupsMessageFormat
data.value: Delete these {0} backups? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Dialog_RestoreBackupMessageFormat
data.value:
Restore backup "{0}"?
The current game folder will be backed up first.

data.name: BackupFailure_BackupDirectoryInsideInstance
data.value: The backup folder cannot be inside the instance folder. Choose a folder outside the instance folder.

data.name: BackupFailure_InstanceDirectoryMissing
data.value: The current instance folder does not exist, so a backup cannot be created.

data.name: BackupFailure_Generic
data.value: A problem occurred while creating the backup. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_InstanceRenameFailed
data.value: Failed to rename version. Please try again later.

data.name: Status_InstanceRenameUnchanged
data.value: The version name and icon have not changed.

data.name: Status_InstanceSettingsSaveFailed
data.value: Failed to save game settings. Please try again later.

data.name: Dialog_JavaRequirementNotMetMessage
data.value: Automatic Java selection could not find a Java runtime that meets this version requirement. Refresh or import a suitable Java runtime in Settings before launching.

data.name: Dialog_JavaRequirementNotMetMessageFormat
data.value: Automatic Java selection could not find a Java runtime that meets this version requirement. This version requires at least Java {0}. Refresh or import a suitable Java runtime in Settings before launching.

data.name: Dialog_JavaRuntimeMissingMessage
data.value: Automatic Java selection could not find any usable local Java runtime. Refresh or import a suitable Java runtime in Settings before launching.

data.name: Dialog_JavaRuntimeMissingMessageFormat
data.value: Automatic Java selection could not find any local Java runtime. This version requires at least Java {0}. Refresh or import a suitable Java runtime in Settings before launching.

data.name: Dialog_JavaManualVersionTooLowMessageFormat
data.value: "{0}" requires at least Java {1}, but the manually selected runtime is Java {2}. Choose a suitable Java runtime in Settings; you can force launch, but the game may still exit abnormally.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchStatusStartupFailedMessage
data.value: The launcher could not complete the game launch preparation.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchStatusStartupAbnormalMessage
data.value: The game process exited abnormally during startup. Exit code: {0}.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchStatusRuntimeAbnormalMessage
data.value: The game process exited abnormally while running. Exit code: {0}.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchStatusDiagnosticFileHint
data.value: A launch diagnostic log has been generated. Open the log folder for details.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchStatusDiagnosticDirectoryHint
data.value: Open the log folder to view latest.log and crash reports.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisUnknownDetail
data.value: The launcher could not identify the exact cause from the current logs.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisUnknownRecommendation
data.value: Open the log folder for details.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisJavaVersionDetailFormat
data.value: {0} requires Java {1} or later, but this instance is using Java {2}.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisJavaVersionRecommendationFormat
data.value: Import or select Java {0} or later in Settings, then launch this game again.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisModDependencyDetailFormat
data.value: {0} requires dependency {1}, but it was not found in this instance.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisModDependencyDetail
data.value: A required mod dependency is missing.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisModDependencyRecommendation
data.value: Install the missing dependency according to the logs, or remove the mod with incomplete dependencies.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisModVersionDetail
data.value: Some mods in this instance are not compatible with Minecraft, the loader, or other mod versions.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisModVersionRecommendation
data.value: Check whether the mods match the current Minecraft and loader versions. Update or remove conflicting mods if needed.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisMissingFilesDetail
data.value: Critical game files, libraries, or launch targets are missing during startup.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisMissingClasspathEntryDetailFormat
data.value: The launch command references a missing file: {0}

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisMissingClientJarDetailFormat
data.value: This instance is missing the client jar file: {0}

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisMissingFilesRecommendation
data.value: Enable pre-launch file checking and try again, or reinstall this instance.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisOutOfMemoryDetail
data.value: The Java virtual machine ran out of memory during startup or runtime.

data.name: Dialog_LaunchAnalysisOutOfMemoryRecommendation
data.value: Increase the allocated memory in launch settings, or reduce resource packs, shaders, and large mods.

data.name: Settings_MinecraftDirectoryDescription
data.value: This controls where the launcher scans instances, versions, and related game files.

data.name: Status_OpenMinecraftDirectoryFailed
data.value: Failed to open the Minecraft folder.

data.name: Status_OpenBackupDirectoryFailed
data.value: Failed to open the backup folder.

data.name: Settings_LauncherLogDirectoryDescription
data.value: Launcher runtime logs and diagnostic logs are stored here.

data.name: Dialog_DeleteSingleModMessageFormat
data.value: Delete mod "{0}"? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Dialog_DeleteMultipleModsMessageFormat
data.value: Delete these {0} mods? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Status_OpenModFileLocationFailed
data.value: Failed to open mod file location.

data.name: Dialog_ReplaceModImportMessageFormat
data.value: A mod named "{0}" already exists. Replace it?

data.name: GameSettings_ModManagementUnavailableMessage
data.value: Mods cannot be installed for the current version.

data.name: Dialog_DeleteSingleSaveMessageFormat
data.value: Delete save "{0}"? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Dialog_DeleteMultipleSavesMessageFormat
data.value: Delete these {0} saves? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Dialog_InvalidSaveArchiveMessage
data.value: The selected file is not a valid save archive.

data.name: Dialog_UnsupportedSaveArchiveMessage
data.value: This archive format is not supported.

data.name: Status_OpenLocalSaveFolderFailed
data.value: Failed to open local save folder.

data.name: GameSettings_DropImportModsMessage
data.value: Drop mod files here to import them.

data.name: GameSettings_DropImportSavesMessage
data.value: Drop save archives here to import them.

data.name: GameSettings_DropUnsupportedFileMessage
data.value: This file type is not supported.

data.name: GameSettings_DropModsOnlyMessage
data.value: Only .jar mod files can be imported here.

data.name: GameSettings_DropSaveArchivesOnlyMessage
data.value: Only save archives can be imported here.

data.name: GameSettings_DropFoldersUnsupportedMessage
data.value: Folder import is not supported here.

data.name: Dialog_DeleteMultipleResourcePacksMessageFormat
data.value: Delete these {0} resource packs? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Dialog_DeleteSingleResourcePackMessageFormat
data.value: Delete resource pack "{0}"? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Dialog_UnsupportedResourcePackArchiveMessage
data.value: Only .zip resource packs can be imported.

data.name: GameSettings_DropImportResourcePacksMessage
data.value: Drop resource pack archives here to import them.

data.name: GameSettings_DropResourcePackArchivesOnlyMessage
data.value: Only .zip resource pack archives can be imported here.

data.name: Status_LoadLocalResourcePacksFailed
data.value: Failed to load local resource packs.

data.name: Status_LocalResourcePackImportFailed
data.value: Failed to import local resource pack.

data.name: Status_LocalResourcePackImportFileNotFound
data.value: The selected resource pack file was not found.

data.name: Status_OpenLocalResourcePackFolderFailed
data.value: Failed to open local resource pack folder.

data.name: Status_OpenLocalResourcePackLocationFailed
data.value: Failed to open resource pack file location.

data.name: Status_SelectedResourcePacksDeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete selected resource packs.

data.name: Dialog_DeleteMultipleShaderPacksMessageFormat
data.value: Delete these {0} shader packs? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Dialog_DeleteSingleShaderPackMessageFormat
data.value: Delete shader pack "{0}"? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Dialog_UnsupportedShaderPackArchiveMessage
data.value: Only .zip shader packs can be imported.

data.name: GameSettings_DropImportShaderPacksMessage
data.value: Drop shader pack archives here to import them.

data.name: GameSettings_DropShaderPackArchivesOnlyMessage
data.value: Only .zip shader pack archives can be imported here.

data.name: Status_LoadLocalShaderPacksFailed
data.value: Failed to load local shader packs.

data.name: Status_LocalShaderPackImportFailed
data.value: Failed to import local shader pack.

data.name: Status_LocalShaderPackImportFileNotFound
data.value: The selected shader pack file was not found.

data.name: Status_OpenLocalShaderPackFolderFailed
data.value: Failed to open local shader pack folder.

data.name: Status_OpenLocalShaderPackLocationFailed
data.value: Failed to open shader pack file location.

data.name: Status_SelectedShaderPacksDeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete selected shader packs.

data.name: Dialog_ModpackManualDownloadsMessageFormat
data.value: Instance "{0}" was created, but {1} files failed to download.

data.name: Dialog_ModpackManualDownloadsHint
data.value: Some files must be downloaded manually. Open the generated list for details.

data.name: Status_ModpackImportedWithManualDownloadsFormat
data.value: {0} imported; some files need to be retried later or completed manually.

data.name: Status_OpenModpackManualDownloadsFileFailed
data.value: Failed to open the manual downloads file.

data.name: Status_OpenUpdatePageFailed
data.value: Failed to open the update page.

data.name: Status_UpdateAutoInstallPackageNotFound
data.value: No auto-installable update package was found.

data.name: Status_LauncherUpdateRestarting
data.value: Installing the update. The launcher will restart automatically.
